parents.subject: LU-6246 utils: add CCAN JSON parser / emitter from

commit.subject: LU-6246 tests: add CCAN Test Framework from CCAN
commit.message:
LU-6246 tests: add CCAN Test Framework from CCAN

This is the test framework for the CCAN JSON implementation.

Added CCAN tap (Test Anything Protocol), from
https://ccodearchive.net/tarballs/with-deps/tap.tar.bz2.

 1486 2014-11-07 22:24 ccan/tap/_info
 9855 2011-11-13 17:30 ccan/tap/tap.3
 9251 2012-11-17 22:39 ccan/tap/tap.c
 8136 2012-11-17 22:39 ccan/tap/tap.h
 2918 2012-11-17 22:39 ccan/tap/test/run.c
    0 2014-06-05 22:34 ccan/compiler/LICENSE -> ../../licenses/CC0
 1533 2014-11-07 22:24 ccan/compiler/_info
 5958 2014-11-07 22:24 ccan/compiler/compiler.h
  361 2011-11-13 17:30 ccan/compiler/test/compile_fail-printf.c
  317 2012-11-17 22:39 ccan/compiler/test/run-is_compile_constant.c
 6383 2014-06-05 22:34 licenses/CC0

Imported as-is, except for CC0 which was moved to LICENSE, leaving
only the ccan/ subdirectory.

Signed-off-by: frank zago <fzago@cray.com>
Change-Id: I65092c9e9ca06d6624ab6d3b818352a367677ac2
